title: Conditionally executed code should be reachable
description: Conditionally executed code should be reachableAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugcwebased-on-misracertunusedsuspiciouspitfallWhy is this an issue?More InfoConditional expressions which are alwaystrueorfalsecan lead tounreachable code.Noncompliant code examplea = false; if (a) { // Noncompliant doSomething(); // never executed } if (!a || b) { // Noncompliant; "!a" is always "true", "b" is never evaluated doSomething(); } else { doSomethingElse(); // never executed }Available In:Detect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
